name: 118th Gangster Crips
description: The 118 Gangster Crips are an African-American Crip set under the Gangster Crips card, based in Hawthorne, California. Formed in the 1980s, they rival the Hawthorne Piru and Acacia Blocc Hustlers.

sources.title: Team 118th Gangster Crips 118th Gangster Crips — StreetGangs
